text:
There was a young girl named Holly who loved wild animals. Every day after school, she would visit Hidden Cove Wildlife Reserve. There she would watch the birds fly overhead, listen to the seals bark sleepily on beach currows. Most exciting of all were the foxes. They seemed to love her. Holly would toss them nuts. They'd purr approvingly. One day, she noticed an old man catching one. He pulled out a big glove. Holly shriiked! Then the fox was in her hand! Ow! They flew across the pond! Down went shiny feathers!

Just then a big owl swooped—Holly! Ow! Down went the owl!

Holly? Ow? Oh!

Just relax.

You're at the zoo now.

Look! There's your favorite!<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
